name: Foolproof Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips with Eagle Brand.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Spread evenly into a wax paper-lined 8-inch square pan.
4. Chill for 2 to 3 hours or until firm.
5. Turn fudge onto a cutting board, peel off the paper, and cut into squares.
6. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
I usually melt the chips and Eagle Brand in the microwave. I also use less vanilla as I have strong pure vanilla that I bought in Mexico; a little goes a long way!
